data.title: Zensai Executives to speak at HumanX 2026 on AI's role in reskilling workforce and unlocking potential. CEO and CBO to discuss in New York on Feb. 17.
data.description: The CEO and Chief Business Officer are set to talk about the changing impact of AI on reskilling the current workforce, enhancing people operations, and unleashing human capabilities in the era of intelligent work. The event is to take place in New York on February 17, 2026. Zensai, the Human Success Platform aiding companies in their growth efforts will be at the center of the discussion, showcasing how AI is transforming these aspects.

data.title: Hyperscale Data has 600.5299 Bitcoin in treasury and holdings at 136.82% of market cap.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, Hyperscale Data, Inc. (NYSE American: GPUS), a leading artificial intelligence data center firm focused on Bitcoin, disclosed details about its Bitcoin treasury. The company revealed that the treasury comprises Bitcoin obtained through mining activities.

data.title: Henry Schein One connects Align Technology's iTero™ scanners to Dentrix, Dentrix Ascend, and Dentally, streamlining digital scanning for global practices.
data.description: A direct data integration has been unveiled by Henry Schein One in American Fork, Utah, linking Align Technology's iTero™ intraoral scanners with their main practice management software—Dentrix, Dentrix Ascend, and Dentally. This integration streamlines the process of digital scanning, diagnosis, and daily operations for dental practices globally. The collaboration with Align Technology has resulted in an automatic import of iTero scans into patient records through the integration, removing the need for manual uploads or duplicates. This advancement is set to enhance efficiency and productivity in dental practices.

data.title: Somnigroup Intl. Inc. sees impressive growth in Q4 2025: 55% in sales, 65% in EPS, and 94% in operating income. Dividend up 13% to $0.17.
data.description: In the final quarter of 2025, Somnigroup experienced a significant increase in sales with a growth rate of 55%. The earnings per share (EPS) saw a notable rise of 65%, while the adjusted EPS(1) showed a growth of 20%. The company also witnessed a robust growth in operating income, which surged by 94% during the same quarter. Additionally, reflecting its strong performance, Somnigroup raised its quarterly cash dividend by 13% to $0.17 per share. This data was released from Dallas on February 17, 2026.

data.title: BBQ World Cup kicks off with $1 million event in Las Vegas; 40 qualifying events lead to finals in April 2027.
data.description: In April 2027, Season One of the inaugural BBQ World Cup will conclude in Las Vegas after connecting 40 qualifying events in the United States and internationally. This new global competition aims to unify the barbecue community, with the pathway to the championship involving a series of events. The competition promises to bring together participants from various regions to showcase their skills and creativity in the art of competitive barbecue.

data.title: Kennedy Wilson to be acquired by consortium led by William McMorrow and Fairfax Financial in all-cash transaction.
data.description: Kennedy-Wilson Holdings, Inc. and Fairfax Financial Holdings Limited have revealed in a joint announcement that Kennedy Wilson is set to be acquired in an all-cash deal. The agreement, known as the Merger Agreement, involves an entity affiliated with a consortium led by William McMorrow, who serves as the Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of Kennedy Wilson. The consortium includes other senior executives of the company, along with Fairfax. The acquisition news was disclosed on February 17, 2026, with the deal involving entities trading under the tickers TSX: FFH and FFH.U.

data.title: Trilogy Metals reports strong fiscal year-end results for 2025 with $51.6 million cash balance and $17.8 million US federal investment in Upper Kobuk Mineral Projects to support critical minerals production in Alaska. Strategic partnerships in place for project advancement with a $35 million budget approved for 2026. U.S. government committed to facilitating financing for Ambler Access Project as part of the joint venture with South32 Limited. Landmark year for the company strengthening financial position and leadership for targeted project execution.
data.description: Trilogy Metals Inc. reported its financial results for the year ending November 30, 2025, emphasizing a strong cash balance of $51.6 million and a $17.8 million strategic investment commitment from the U.S. federal government. The company approved a $35 million budget for the Ambler Metals joint venture to advance the Arctic deposit towards production. The U.S. also committed to facilitating financing for the construction of the Ambler Road, linking the UKMP to the Dalton Highway. Plans include opening the Bornite camp for exploration drilling. The company aims to secure domestic supplies of critical minerals and advance the UKMP in partnership with key stakeholders. Wildlife management expenses in 2025 rose to $3,450,000.
